title: Canonical T2 merge-authority + PM-approval definition

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Last substantive doc-change commit. Subsequent proof-generate commits are proof artifacts only.

pnpm_verify_parallel.note: lint + type-check in parallel, then build + test, all green

r_level.note: Docs-only diff; no source, migration, or workflow YAML changed

runtime_proof.note: Docs-only governance lane. test:db run per governance runtime-validation policy (OPERATING_MODEL_SONNET5.md §5) to satisfy T1 tier policy, not because runtime behavior changed.
queries: UTV2-920: invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
UTV2-920: invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement, lifecycle event, or audit row
UTV2-883: no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport
UTV2-996: re-settling a settled pick creates correction — no true duplicate base rows
UTV2-996: correction chain is additive — original settlement row is not mutated

scope_note: Reconciled T2 merge-authority language across CLAUDE.md, EXECUTION_TRUTH_MODEL.md, WORKFLOW_SPEC.md, DELEGATION_POLICY.md, three-brain.md, and OPERATING_MODEL_SONNET5.md to match what .github/workflows/merge-gate.yml mechanically enforces (T2: GitHub PR review approval or pm-verdict/v1 APPROVED comment, no PM presence required). merge-gate.yml itself was read as ground truth, not modified.
